untranslatable_reason: Signal references a custom 'divergence indicator' comparing companion series to benchmark (S&P 500). This indicator is not available in the allowed list. The mapping of thresholds (50.5/49.5) and percentile-based positioning (55th/45th percentile) has been approximated using price_pos_20 (relative position in 20-bar channel) and bb_pct_b (Bollinger Band position), but these are proxies. The true divergence comparison mechanism between two separate series cannot be replicated without the divergence indicator itself.
translation_notes: Used price_pos_20 to represent relative channel position (0.55 ≈ 55th percentile, 0.45 ≈ 45th percentile). Used bb_pct_b as proxy for threshold-based divergence signal (0.505 ≈ upper threshold 50.5, 0.495 ≈ lower threshold 49.5). Entry is immediate (confirmation_bars=0). Stop-loss set to 1% as specified. Take-profit added at 1% gain per exit conditions. This is a best-effort translation but fundamentally requires the companion series divergence indicator not in the allowed set.
